description_long: This hotel complex features a modern, low-rise architectural design with multiple interconnected buildings and extensive outdoor amenities. The grounds include a large swimming pool, tennis courts, landscaped gardens, and several lounge areas with sunbeds and umbrellas. A glass-roofed conservatory or greenhouse structure is visible, along with a central courtyard and a variety of trees and greenery. The main building has large windows, flat roofs, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces, suggesting both private rooms and communal areas. The property is surrounded by a perimeter fence and includes a driveway or entrance path leading to the main entrance. The overall layout emphasizes luxury, recreation, and relaxation in a contemporary setting.
description: A modern, low-rise hotel complex with interconnected buildings, large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, tennis courts, and a glass-roofed conservatory.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, swimming pool, tennis courts, and central landscaped area with trees and lounge spaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass-roofed conservatory, tennis courts, and the extensive garden area with a large decorative tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main building, additional green spaces, and the driveway or entrance path.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tennis courts, conservatory, and the arrangement of outdoor lounge areas and greenery.
